name: Akron, OH
author: bean1322
description:
Map of the Akron-Canton area

Map made with US demand generator by slurry and the Map Patcher by Kronifer.

Using 2023 LODES data

Airports: CAK

Universities: University of Akron, Kent State, Malone University, Stark State, Kent State Stark, University of Akron Wayne, College of Wooster, Walsh University, Northeast Ohio Medical University

Entertainment: Lock 3, Canal Park, Summit Mall, Akron Zoo, National Football Hall of Fame, Cuyahoga Valley National Park, Stan Hywett Hall & Gardens, McKinley Monument and Museum
